title: AL's Advanced Armory
description: A pack that adds advanced improvements for Armor!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7f438d62095377668dc0a7f2ba91aa5600f9f3a.png)

# 

This pack adds several advanced improvements for Armor!

I made this as a more "Modernized-Vanilla style" pack with the goal of making the Armors now better match their respective material.

While new, I made sure to stay-true to their Iconic designs while no-longer looking like plastic.



***IMPORTANT*: While this pack can technically be used in Vanilla, it is recommended to use [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) since the Baby Mob Armors and Piglin Helmets use Custom Entity Models.**

![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73ff7db239b3cab2aa7adcd434dfa17b410e8b2a.png)
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e08b07a5464929686239b885ed8498bee3db59fc.png)
![Visual Armor Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c127917329c7ee9f9ade07fab3ae82935720a46b.png)


Features:

*New Textures for the Armor Models and Items

*Built-In Visual Armor Trims, in collaboration with [thanos](https://modrinth.com/user/thanos)

*Custom Baby Mob Armor Models (Requires EMF)

*Custom Piglin and Zombified Piglin Helmet models (Requires EMF)
